content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (after iter-304)

## HIGH — structural re-sign (auditor major, file NOT protected)
1. **Add `[Flat g]` to `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` (L283).** The residual sorry `e` (cosimplicial Beck–Chevalley iso) requires flatness; as currently typed the def has no `[Flat g]`, so the sorry is **permanently unfillable**. `cech_flatBaseChange` (L322) already carries `[Flat g]` and would pass it down. This is a planner/refactor re-sign — the file is unprotected. Do this BEFORE any prover lane targets `e`.
2. **Thread `hF : F.IsQuasicoherent` (or drop it).** `cech_flatBaseChange` (L324) declares `hF` but it never reaches `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` (Lean flags it unused). When `e` is eventually built, quasicoherence is needed; either add the hyp to `cechComplex_baseChange_iso`'s signature alongside `[Flat g]`, or document why it is consumed only at the homology stage.

## HIGH — the leaf-2 frontier moved cross-file
3. **The whole leaf-2 residual is now `e` = the open pushforward base-change natural iso in `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`.** `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` cannot progress from its own file. Next prover work on 02KH must be a **FlatBaseChange.lean lane** building a sorry-free natural iso
   `Scheme.Modules.pushforward f ⋙ Scheme.Modules.pullback g ≅ Scheme.Modules.pullback g' ⋙ Scheme.Modules.pushforward f'` over the cartesian square (concrete-tilde route + `pullbackSpecIso` + `cancelBaseChange`; affine-reduction-on-`S` is the documented wall). Then whisker through the nerve + twisted-nerve identification (step d) to assemble `e`.
   - `affine_pushforward_pullback_baseChange` (step a) should be assigned to THAT lane, not back to CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean (the prover showed it is orphaned from the Čech file's assembly path).
   - WARNING: this is the `restrictScalars`/scalar-tower-diamond region that stalled FlatBaseChange.lean ~30 iters. Before assigning, get a fresh analogist/effort-breaker pass on the affine reduction — do not hand a prover the bare `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`.

## DO NOT RE-ASSIGN (blocked, same wall ≥ many iters)
- **`pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (L131, leaf-1).** iter-244 abstract-left-adjoint wall: no stalk functor for (pre)sheaves of modules; stalkwise route DEAD; multi-hundred-LOC. Untouched this iter per DO-NOT-TOUCH. Do not assign without a structural plan first.

## MEDIUM — blueprint coverage debt (1-to-1 Lean↔tex) — planner authors nodes
4 new non-private `lean_aux` decls from this iter have NO blueprint entry (`archon dag-query unmatched` confirms). All belong in `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex` §`sec:cech_base_change_construction`:
- `AlgebraicGeometry.map_alternatingCofaceMapComplex_objD` — additive functor commutes with `objD`. Deps: `Functor.map_sum`, `Functor.map_zsmul`. (new node)
- `AlgebraicGeometry.mapAlternatingCofaceMapComplexIso` — **already linked this iter**: review added `\lean{}` to existing `lem:pullback_commutes_alternatingCofaceMapComplex`. No new node needed.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.pullback_cechComplex_alternatingIso` — degreewise `g^*` of `CechComplex` in alternating-coface form. Deps: the above + `CechComplex = relativeCechComplexOfNerve` (defeq). (new node)
- `AlgebraicGeometry.cechComplex_baseChange_iso_of_cosimplicialIso` — **factoring lemma** reducing leaf-2 to the cosimplicial iso `e`. Deps: `pullback_cechComplex_alternatingIso`, `Functor.mapIso`, `alternatingCofaceMapComplex`. This is the new precise statement of the leaf-2 residual — most warrants its own node; per the checker the step-c node `lem:cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` should NOT be re-pointed (Lean `e` bundles Beck–Chevalley + twisted-nerve, more than step-c).
- (private `alternatingCofaceMapComplex_d` needs no blueprint node.)

## MEDIUM — blueprint structural bugs (doctor iter-304; will crash `leanblueprint web`)
- Define/fix undefined macro `\restriction` in `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex` (L10876) and `\llbracket`/`\rrbracket` in `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (`\providecommand` in macros or chapter-local).
- Fix stale `% archon:covers` in `AbelianVarietyRigidity.tex` — it covers 7 non-existent paths (`Genus0BaseObjects/*`, `AbelianVarietyRigidity.lean`); mis-routes the prover-dispatch HARD GATE.
- Resolve broken `\cref`/`\uses` (no `\label`): 2 in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`, 13 in `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`.

## Reusable proof pattern (record in PROJECT_STATUS KB)
**Transporting an additive functor through `alternatingCofaceMapComplex`:** use `isoOfComponents (fun _ => Iso.refl _)`; `.X i` is defeq-not-syntactic to `Y.obj ⟨i⟩`, so close the differential square with `exact <objD-distribution-lemma>` (NOT `rw`) and clear unit identities with `erw [Category.id_comp, Category.comp_id]`. Plain `simp`/`rw` fails.

## LOW
- Minor: `erw` at L213 fragile vs `Iso.refl_hom` definitional status (`simp [Iso.refl_hom]` more robust); iteration-anchored comments (L293, L331) will go stale.
